# Edge Case Matrix

Categories: boundary, negative/invalid, exception/failure, state, concurrency,
permission, empty/null, temporal/rule-change, batch/schedule. Mark coverage and
the expected behavior.

| # | Requirement | Category | Scenario | Expected behavior | Covered? | AP if missing |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | <Req id> | boundary | Max 100 items in cart | Reject 101st with error | yes/no | missing-edge-case |
| 2 | <Req id> | exception | Payment gateway timeout | Order stays pending, retry prompt | yes/no | missing-exception-flow |
| 3 | <Req id> | state | Cancel an already-shipped order | Disallowed; only pending/paid cancellable | yes/no | undefined-state |
| 4 | <Req id> | permission | Non-owner edits resource | Denied + audit log | yes/no | missing-permission |
| 5 | <Req id> | concurrency | Two requests update same row | Last-write-wins / locking defined | yes/no | missing-idempotency |
| 6 | <Req id> | empty | Empty input submitted | Validation error | yes/no | missing-edge-case |
| 7 | <Req id> | temporal/rule-change | Event dated before vs on/after a rate change | Uses the rate version in effect on the event date; existing accounts grandfathered | yes/no | missing-effective-dating / missing-cohort-treatment |
| 8 | <Req id> | batch/schedule | Accrual job reruns / fails midway | Idempotent per (account, date); resumes without double-posting | yes/no | missing-batch-job-spec |
